Quality Education.reason: As a Master's program course, it provides tertiary education (4.3) and develops technical skills ('操作影像語彙的能力') for employment (4.4), fostering knowledge and appreciation of film aesthetics (4.7).
evidence: 最終能練就操作影像語彙的能力

evidence: 革命性的創新電影剪接語法

evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。
